# SC/GC Scheduling Lesson Learned

We had Jason DeMotts (who is awesome) as our president but he just took over and it was his first season. I went away to Turks and Caicos and felt good about scheduling being on track because they were saying the right things. Little did I know we were talking about two different systems. So instead of entering the schedules into Sports Connect, our one source of truth, they entered them directly into GameChanger, which at the time didn't sync back. Jason worked sooo hard to help do it, not realizing it was an awful decision.

Our software (SC) is really great for scheduling, but the schedules went out in GC to the family so we couldn't recall them. The result was what you experienced last year. So this year we set out to not just fix what happened last year, but to totally revamp it and create a process around it including putting together a little committee to introduce AI to scheduling.

Also worth noting: SC now has a feature that knows if you coach multiple teams and will flag games/practices different colors as the games or practice times get too close to one another.
